notes:
### v1.3.0

#### User-facing changes
- Added the new Theme setting with Outlaw, Alchemist, Void Space, Sidereal Gold, and Powi themes.
- Replaced the native title bar with a tighter custom app header, including drag support and minimize, maximize, and close controls.
- Expanded the Set-Up Guide so it now explains Dashboard, Roster, Tracking, Raid settings, To Do, Marketplace, MeowConnect, System options, Updates, and Progression.
- Added a Haal's Hourglass reminder option for Tuesday weekly-reset prep when 1730+ characters still have tracked Cube unfinished.
- Improved Settings readability across Raid, Tracking, Roster, and System pages.
- Improved MeowConnect onboarding text for Sync now, friends, groups, tags, Raid Together, and expanded profile details.
- Aligned character headers, iLvl, CP, gold markers, matrix controls, and mixed raid difficulty labels across major views.

#### Technical changes
- Reorganized visible frontend features behind `src/lib/components/features.ts` and split Dashboard, To Do, Settings, MeowConnect, Marketplace, Updates, and app shell code into focused components.
- Added shared UI primitives for segmented controls, toggle switches, toggle buttons, roster buttons, matrix shells, and modal/control styling.
- Added CSS token layers and per-theme files under `src/lib/styles`, with app theme persistence and early HTML theme application.
- Split MeowConnect UI and service logic into focused modules for availability, logs, snapshots, groups, preferences, profile helpers, and subpanels.
- Added Tauri v2 window capabilities for custom header drag, minimize, maximize/restore, and close commands.
- Added a theme-independent Set-Up Guide highlight token so guide targets stay visible across all themes.
- Added persisted system setting support for the Haal's Hourglass reminder and a Tuesday-only dashboard snapshot check for 1730+ tracked Cube characters.
- Cleaned backend startup, system handler, database schema, migration, roster scraper, detailed scraper, repository, and logging responsibilities without changing user data ownership.
- Clarified backend table ownership: `conf_raid` remains Settings > Raids, `conf_tracking` remains Settings > Tracking, and `completion_status` remains clear state.
- Moved SQLite base schema and migrations into dedicated modules and separated the hidden detailed character scraper from the stable roster scraper.
- Kept Supabase snapshot retention as a follow-up SQL maintenance task for rows older than 10 days.
